title: Ama Quansah
text:
welcome!👋
I’m Ama Quansah, a Master of Arts student in Communication Studies at Texas Tech University, and I’m thrilled to have you here! My research focuses on the power of organizational, interpersonal, and intercultural communication. I’m passionate about how effective communication within organizations can boost efficiency, foster collaboration, and tackle socio-economic challenges. I’m also interested in exploring how communication can contribute to public health efforts, especially examining public reactions to health policies and interventions. I truly believe that communication—both within organizations and across communities—holds the key to solving complex health and development issues, raising awareness, and driving meaningful social change.
This website is a work in progress—just like my research! I’ll be updating it regularly with new insights, findings, and all things communication. Stay tuned for the latest updates, and I’m excited to have you along for the ride! 🚀

Education

    
        M.A. Communications | Texas Tech University, Lubbock, 2024 - Present
    
    
       B.Com. Marketing | University of Cape Coast, Ghana, 2021
